fields.raw_row_count: integer, count of in-scope public source rows
fields.canonical_person_count: integer, count of resolved people including quarantined people
fields.merged_duplicate_cluster_count: integer, count of multi-row clusters merged as the same person
fields.quarantine_row_count: integer, count of source rows with no usable contact channel
fields.contested_identifier_cluster_count: integer, count of watchlist identifier cases that remain contested
fields.dispatchable_person_count: integer, count of IDs in dispatchable_master_ids

item_fields.focus_person_id: string, one of FOCUS-001 through FOCUS-005
item_fields.source_row_anchor: string, exact public row ID from case_scope.json
item_fields.member_row_ids: list<string>, all public row IDs resolved to this person, sorted lexicographically
item_fields.master_id: string, selected public source row ID used as the stable master ID
item_fields.canonical_email: string, trimmed Unicode NFKC lowercase email
item_fields.depot_code: string, canonical value of the public region field
item_fields.name_source_system: enum: HR Directory | Dispatch | Identity Registry
item_fields.contact_source_system: enum: HR Directory | Dispatch | Identity Registry
item_fields.depot_source_system: enum: HR Directory | Dispatch | Identity Registry
item_fields.consent_source_system: enum: HR Directory | Dispatch | Identity Registry

item_fields.depot_code: string, value of the public region field
item_fields.blocked_consent_count: integer, active person with a usable channel but non-granted consent
item_fields.blocked_no_contact_count: integer, person with no usable canonical channel
item_fields.blocked_inactive_count: integer, inactive person with a usable channel

readiness_by_depot.count_partition_rule: For each depot, the four disposition counts sum to total_person_count.

item_fields.control_case_id: string, one of CONTROL-001 through CONTROL-011
item_fields.evidence_row_ids: list<string>, exact public row IDs supplied for this case in case_scope.json, sorted lexicographically

numeric_precision: All counts are exact integers; no floating-point fields are permitted.
